_comment: 1-D diagnostic config: identical to parameter_config.json (canonical full-range) EXCEPT omega_d sampling is widened from sigma=0.01 GHz to 0.033 GHz so 3sigma = 100 MHz = the full ±half-span × 2 safety rail. Most samples span ±50 MHz (the action half-span), giving the agent a real learning signal without exceeding the recoverable range. Used together with pin_to_gt: [omega_01, phi, Omega, beta] and zero_hw + zero_crosstalk for the fix-4-vary-omegad ablation.

pulse._comment_beta: DRAG coefficient. Optimum is beta=0.5 for the raised-cosine envelope (NOT 1.0).
